title: Watch: SA bowler grabs Bangladesh batsman’s helmet
description: CRICKET NEWS - SA Emerging spinner Tshepo...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - SA Emerging spinner Tshepo Ntuli and Bangladesh Emerging tailender Ripon Mondol were involved in an ugly clash yesterday.


> After being hit for six by the No 10 batsman, Ntuli walked up to Mondol and exchanged a few heated words.


He then shoved him and grabbed the grill of his helmet, before the umpire helped separate the pair.

Ntuli dismissed Mondol 12 overs later for 43.

VIDEO: See a video of the incident on Facebook

The post Watch: SA bowler grabs batsman’s helmet appeared first on SA Cricketmag.

Article: Caxton Network News

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
